originalPrompt: Create a minimal single-page landing site for a lab technician. Requirements: single HTML page, responsive, hero with title/subtitle, brief services list, contact form (no backend; form just shows an alert). Use only red, black, and white. Include a simple README and one basic Jest test to check index.html contains the hero title.

subtasks.title: Initialize project and tooling
subtasks.description: Create a minimal project folder with index.html, styles.css, script.js, README.md, package.json, and a __tests__ directory. Add Jest as a dev dependency and set the npm test script to run jest.
subtasks.successCriteria: package.json exists with jest in devDependencies and a test script; required files are created in the correct paths.

subtasks.title: Build the single HTML landing page
subtasks.description: Implement index.html with semantic sections: a responsive meta viewport, a hero containing the title 'Professional Lab Technician' and a subtitle, a brief services list, and a contact form with name, email, and message fields.
subtasks.successCriteria: index.html renders one page with hero title 'Professional Lab Technician', subtitle, services list, and a contact form; includes <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">.

subtasks.title: Implement responsive styles with limited palette
subtasks.description: Create styles.css with mobile-first layout, ensuring typography and spacing scale well. Use only red, black, and white colors across all CSS rules and ensure good contrast and clean layout.
subtasks.successCriteria: styles.css applies only red (#ff0000 or red), black (#000), and white (#fff); page remains readable and well laid out on small and large screens.

subtasks.title: Wire the contact form to show an alert
subtasks.description: In script.js, add a submit event listener to the contact form that prevents default submission and shows a friendly alert message confirming receipt.
subtasks.successCriteria: Submitting the form triggers a JavaScript alert without a page reload or network request.

subtasks.title: Verify responsiveness and basic accessibility
subtasks.description: Manually test the page at common breakpoints, ensure headings are structured, form inputs have labels, color contrast is sufficient, and content does not overflow on mobile.
subtasks.successCriteria: Content is usable at ~320px to desktop widths; labels are associated with inputs; no horizontal scrolling; color contrast remains readable.

subtasks.title: Write a simple README
subtasks.description: Create README.md describing the project, color restrictions, file structure, how to open index.html locally, and how to install dependencies and run tests.
subtasks.successCriteria: README.md includes project overview, setup instructions, usage, test instructions, and notes on the red/black/white palette.

subtasks.title: Add a Jest test to check hero title exists
subtasks.description: Create __tests__/index.test.js that reads index.html via fs and asserts the file contains the exact hero title text 'Professional Lab Technician'. Ensure the test runs with jest.
subtasks.successCriteria: Running `npm test` executes a test that passes only if index.html contains 'Professional Lab Technician'.

subtasks.title: Run tests and verify pass
subtasks.description: Execute the test suite to confirm the Jest test passes and the project is in a working state without errors.
subtasks.successCriteria: `npm test` completes successfully with passing results and no runtime errors.

decompositionStrategy: Tooling-first setup followed by content, styling, behavior, quality checks, documentation, and a minimal automated test.
